case_title: ANGELICA ARCETA, ET AL. VS. MCKESSON CORPORATION

docket_entries.description: ORDER TO SHOW CAUSE SET FOR JUN-20-2011 IN DEPARTMENT 610 AT 1:30 PM FOR FAILURE TO FILE PROOF OF SERVICE ON DEFENDANT(S) AND OBTAIN ANSWER(S), OR ENTER DEFAULT(S) AS TO FIRST AMENDED COMPLAINT. THE MAY-06-2011 CASE MANAGEMENT CONFERENCE IS OFF CALENDAR. NOTICE SENT BY COURT.
RESPONSE TO ORDER TO SHOW CAUSE RE : PROOF OF SERVICE FILED BY PLAINTIFF ARCETA, ANGELICA
DISMISSAL OF ENTIRE ACTION OF ALL PARTIES AND ALL CAUSES OF ACTION WITHOUT PREJUDICE
